allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process -Id 13432 | Select-Object Name,Id; Get-Process -Id 56248 | Select-Object Name,Id")

Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000,5173,5174 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }')
Bash(powershell -Command "docker kill losszerodemo-backend-1; Start-Sleep 2; docker rm losszerodemo-backend-1")
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8080/query -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\\"question\\": \\"테이블 목록 보여줘\\"}")
Bash(curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:8080/query/chat" -H "Content-Type: application/json" --data-binary "{\\"messages\\":[{\\"role\\":\\"user\\",\\"content\\":\\"안녕! 이 DB가 어떤 데이터를 담고 있어?\\"}]}")
Bash(curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:8080/query/chat" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\\"messages\\":[{\\"role\\":\\"user\\",\\"content\\":\\"show me the tables\\"}]}")
Bash(python Query.py "SELECT TOP 5 name FROM sys.tables ORDER BY name" --db 0)
Bash(python Query.py "SELECT TOP 5 name FROM sys.tables ORDER BY name" --db 1)
Bash(python Query.py "SELECT DISTINCT TableNm FROM LzDxpColumnLayoutInfo ORDER BY TableNm" --db 0 --limit 20)
Bash(python Query.py "SELECT TOP 20 TableNm FROM LzDxpColumnLayoutInfo GROUP BY TableNm ORDER BY TableNm" --db 0)
Bash(python Query.py "SELECT TOP 5 * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.ROUTINES WHERE ROUTINE_TYPE = 'PROCEDURE' ORDER BY ROUTINE_NAME" --db 0 --format plain)
Bash(python Query.py "SELECT TOP 5 * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.ROUTINES WHERE ROUTINE_TYPE = 'PROCEDURE' ORDER BY ROUTINE_NAME" --db 1 --format plain)

Bash(python Query.py "SELECT TABLE_SCHEMA, TABLE_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_TYPE = 'BASE TABLE' AND TABLE_NAME LIKE 'TPM_%' ORDER BY TABLE_NAME" --db 1 --format plain --limit 500)
Bash(python Query.py "SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS cnt FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_NAME LIKE 'TPM_%'" --db 1 --format plain)

Bash(python Query.py "SELECT SUBSTRING\(TABLE_NAME, 1, CHARINDEX\('_', TABLE_NAME + '_'\) - 1\) AS prefix, COUNT\(*\) AS cnt FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_TYPE = 'BASE TABLE' GROUP BY SUBSTRING\(TABLE_NAME, 1, CHARINDEX\('_', TABLE_NAME + '_'\) - 1\) ORDER BY cnt DESC" --db 1 --format plain --limit 100)

Bash(python Query.py "SELECT TABLE_SCHEMA, TABLE_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_TYPE = 'BASE TABLE' AND TABLE_NAME LIKE 'WPM_%' ORDER BY TABLE_NAME" --db 1 --format plain --limit 500)

Bash(python Query.py "SELECT TABLE_SCHEMA, TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE, CHARACTER_MAXIMUM_LENGTH, NUMERIC_PRECISION, NUMERIC_SCALE, IS_NULLABLE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME LIKE 'WPM_%' ORDER BY TABLE_NAME, ORDINAL_POSITION" --db 1 --format plain --limit 1000)

Bash(python Query.py "SELECT fk.name AS fk_name, tp.name AS parent_table, cp.name AS parent_column, tr.name AS referenced_table, cr.name AS referenced_column FROM sys.foreign_keys fk JOIN sys.foreign_key_columns fkc ON fk.object_id = fkc.constraint_object_id JOIN sys.tables tp ON fkc.parent_object_id = tp.object_id JOIN sys.columns cp ON fkc.parent_object_id = cp.object_id AND fkc.parent_column_id = cp.column_id JOIN sys.tables tr ON fkc.referenced_object_id = tr.object_id JOIN sys.columns cr ON fkc.referenced_object_id = cr.object_id AND fkc.referenced_column_id = cr.column_id WHERE tp.name LIKE 'WPM_%' OR tr.name LIKE 'WPM_%'" --db 1 --format plain --limit 500)
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8080/query/chat -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\\"messages\\":[{\\"role\\":\\"user\\",\\"content\\":\\"이번달 생산 실적 보여줘\\"}]}")
Bash(python Query.py "SELECT TOP 5 * FROM WPM_DayReport ORDER BY regDt DESC" --db 1 --format plain)
Bash(python Query.py "SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS cnt FROM WPM_DayReport" --db 1 --format plain)
Bash(python Query.py "SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS cnt FROM WPM_WorkPrdPlanMST" --db 1 --format plain)
Bash(python Query.py "SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS cnt FROM WPM_ItemTransMST" --db 1 --format plain)
Bash(python Query.py "SELECT TOP 5 ITID, itDt, pdCd, Qty, wcCd FROM WPM_ItemTransMST ORDER BY regDt DESC" --db 1 --format plain)
Bash(python Query.py "SELECT TOP 5 ITID, itDt, pdCd, Qty FROM dbo.WPM_ItemTransMST ORDER BY itDt DESC" --db 1 --format plain)
Bash(python Query.py "SELECT TOP 5 SRNo FROM dbo.WPM_ItemTransMSTDetail" --db 1 --format plain)
